title: Directory File Watcher
description: Build a program that monitors a directory for file changes (created, modified, deleted) by polling the filesystem and reporting changes.
requirements: Scan a directory and record all files with their modification times
Periodically re-scan and detect new, modified, and deleted files
Print a report of changes each scan cycle
Handle directories that do not exist gracefully
hints: fs::read_dir() returns an iterator of DirEntry items
metadata.modified() gives you the last modification time as SystemTime
Compare two HashMaps: keys in new but not old are created, keys in old but not new are deleted
bonusChallenge: Add recursive directory watching. Use the notify crate for proper filesystem events instead of polling. Add file content hashing to detect modifications more reliably.
